items.name: 🌸BlushWood Blade
items.description:
🌸The Blushwood Blade captures elegance and strength. Crafted from the finest blushwood, its blade embodies the resilience of nature, slicing through obstacles with grace. Adorned with intricate patterns inspired by the forest's canopy, the hilt exudes natural beauty. Golden accents on the crossguard mirror the dawn's first light, while the brown pommel grounds the wielder in the earth's embrace. Wrapped in supple pink leather, the grip ensures control in battle, with a delicate hanging ribbon adding a touch of grace. With each swing, the Blushwood Blade embodies courage and honor, a legendary symbol of victory forged from nature's bounty.

More UGCs: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Kenneth%27s+Server&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=1&IncludeNotForSale
